parameters.query: SELECT type, scheduled_date AS date, LEFT(agenda, 120) AS agenda_short, attendees FROM canonical_meeting WHERE scheduled_date >= CURRENT_DATE AND scheduled_date <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '14 days' ORDER BY scheduled_date ASC LIMIT 10;

meta.description: GET /webhook/upcoming-meetings — returns meetings scheduled in the next 14 days. Used by Glance Rocks & Scorecard page.
